title: Verify password history prevents reuse of the last 5 passwords
description: Tests the security requirement that a user cannot reset their password to one of their last 5 previously used passwords.
preconditions: The user is able to reset their password.

steps.description: 1. Successfully reset the account password to 'NewPass1!'.
2. Repeat the reset process four more times with 'NewPass2!', 'NewPass3!', 'NewPass4!', and 'NewPass5!'.
3. Initiate the password reset flow again.
4. On the reset page, attempt to set the new password to 'NewPass1!' (one of the last 5).

expected_result: The system rejects the password change. An error message is displayed, such as "Password has been used recently. Please choose a new one."
